metadata.title: Smart DayNight switcher
metadata.description: Intelligently determines sunrise and sunset times and automatically switches the color scheme to light or dark mode.

regex.source: text: "Please enter the latitude and longitude of your approximate location (coords of any city within \xB1200 km)"
regex.target: text: "请提供您大致位置的纬度和经度（可以是任何在您当前位置±200公里范围内的城市坐标)"

regex.source: text: "To easily find your latitude and longitude, you can use any simple online service, such as "
regex.target: text: "要轻松找到您的纬度和经度，您可以使用任何简单的在线服务，例如 "

regex.source: text: ", or any other similar tools available on the web."
regex.target: text: ", 或者使用网络上其他类似的工具。"

regex.source: text: "* Obsidian does not provide developers with access to geolocation, so this plugin cannot automatically determine your coordinates."
regex.target: text: "Obsidian 不为开发者提供对地理位置的访问权限，因此此插件无法自动确定您的坐标。"

regex.source: text: "to accurately calculate sunrise and sunset times in your location"
regex.target: text: "为了准确计算您所在位置的日出和日落时间。"

regex.source: text: ", the formula needs an approximate location (within \xB1200 km) of where you are."
regex.target: text: "该公式需要您所在位置的一个大致范围在您当前位置 ±200 公里以内"
